_comment: Per-collection layouts for a page's blocks. Keys match a tag on the page (e.g. 'products', 'properties'). Two optional keys: 'before' — an ordered list of block types to claim and render full-width above the column section; 'columns' — an array of column claim queues pulling from the remaining blocks. Both use the same first-unclaimed-block-of-type matching. Types in 'before' render full-width and may include hero/background/split-* blocks; types inside 'columns' may not. Unclaimed blocks fall through to full-width below. Remove this _comment key and add entries like: "products": { "before": ["hero"], "columns": [ { "types": ["gallery"] }, { "types": ["markdown", "buy-options", "features"] } ] }
